landing.heroDescripcion: Centralize all your entertainment. Manage books, games, movies, and music in a unique and organized personal catalog
landing.bitacorasDescripcion: Our application is the ultimate refuge for your intellectual curiosity, allowing you to record, organize, and rate with surgical precision every book, video game, and multimedia content that has passed through your hands. It's not just a list, but a personal library where you can document each title with exact completion dates, deeply personal critical reviews, and high-resolution images that bring your catalog to life. Beyond simple recording, our platform transforms your cultural consumption into analytical knowledge. Through an advanced visualization engine, you can explore your history through detailed annual progress statistics, thematic performance charts, and the automatic calculation of your average score. It is the digital ecosystem specifically designed for those seeking to preserve the memory of their experiences, analyzing their cultural evolution and organizing their entertainment legacy in an elegant, intuitive, and functional space.
landing.feature1Descripcion: Forget about scattered lists in notes or different apps. Centralize everything in a single personal catalog. ListO is the digital home for all those stories you've finished and that deserve to be remembered.
landing.feature2Descripcion: It's not just about marking as completed. Document your experience: write a personal review, upload your own cover, and assign a 1 to 5-star rating. Turn every entry into an unforgettable memory.
landing.feature3Descripcion: Looking for 그 RPG from three years ago? Find it instantly. Use our advanced filters to keep your library perfectly structured without effort.
landing.feature4Descripcion: Discover your true cultural consumption habits. Access your statistics dashboard and let the data tell your story.
landing.ctaDescripcion: ListO is not just an app, it is the sum of your ideas. Created from scratch thanks to your suggestions, each function has been designed to solve the real needs of those seeking total control over their book library and video game catalog.
landing.ctaImgAlt: Illustration of success in personal library management
